# This file was generated by the YaTool build system (https://github.com/yandex/yatool),
# from a source YaTool build configuration provided in ya.make files.
#
# If the repository supports both CMake and ya build configurations, please modify both of them.
#
# If only CMake build configuration is supported then modify only CMake files and note that only
# simple modifications are allowed like adding source-files to targets or adding simple properties
# like target_include_directories. These modifications will be ported to original ya.make files
# by maintainers. Any complex modifications which can't be easily ported back to the ya build
# system may be rejected.
#
# Please refer to the build instructions in the repository for more information about manual
# changes in this file.

find_package(linux-headers-generic REQUIRED)

add_subdirectory(unittests)
add_subdirectory(benchmarks)

add_library(library-cpp-worker)


target_compile_options(library-cpp-worker PRIVATE
  -Wdeprecated-this-capture
  -Wimplicit-fallthrough
  -Wparentheses
  -Wno-logical-op-parentheses
  -Wno-bitwise-op-parentheses
  -Wswitch
  -Wreturn-type
)

target_link_libraries(library-cpp-worker PUBLIC
  linux-headers-generic::linux-headers-generic
  contrib-libs-cxxsupp
  yutil
  library-cpp-getopt
  cpp-yt-memory
  cpp-yt-string
  yt-library-heavy_hitters
  library-profiling-sensors_owner
  library-query-engine
  yt-library-ytprof
  yt-yt-core
  yt-yt-client
  flow-lib-client
  library-cpp-common
  cpp-common-worker
  library-cpp-computation
  library-cpp-distributed_throttler
  library-cpp-misc
  libs-tcmalloc-malloc_extension
)

target_sources(library-cpp-worker PRIVATE
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/buffer_state_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/config.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/controller_connector.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/input_buffer.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/input_buffer_detail.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/input_manager.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/job_spec.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/job_tracker.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/job.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/message_distributor.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/message_distributor_detail.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/message_service.cpp
  ${PROJECT_SOURCE_DIR}/yt/yt/flow/library/cpp/worker/traced_invoker.cpp
)
